seoTitle: Square Mile vs St Agnes — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Square Mile and St Agnes. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Square Mile vs St Agnes: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Square Mile and St Agnes.
heading: Square Mile vs St Agnes — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Square Mile, South Australia and St Agnes, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Square Mile has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to St Agnes (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Square Mile or St Agnes safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Square Mile has a flood risk score of 23/100, while St Agnes scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Square Mile scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. St Agnes scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Square Mile or St Agnes?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Square Mile has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
